free_text: THERMAL NEUTRON CAPTURE GAMMA RAYS FROM SULFUR
26-CM3 GE(LI) COAXIAL DETECTOR WITH A NAI(TL)
7 PERCENT MINIMUM UNCERTAINTY COMBINED WITH A
STATISTICAL UNCERTAINTY RELATED TO THE MEASURED
NUMBER OF COUNTS UNDER A GIVEN PEAK.
SAMPLE CONTAMINANTS WERE S-34 AND B-10. IN ADDITION
SEVERAL TRACE ELEMENTS WERE PRESENT IN THE TARGET
FROM ISOTOPIC CROSS SECTION DATA TOGETHER WITH 32-S
